nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 菲律宾
nodes.summary: 菲律宾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联131种鸟类，包括细斑树鸭、青头潜鸭、菲律宾冢雉等131种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 非法猎捕
nodes.summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

nodes.name: Flame-breasted fruit dove
nodes.summary: Flame-breasted fruit dove（Flame-breasted fruit dove，学名 Ramphiculus marchei），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于菲律宾、呂宋，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、非法猎捕、猎捕压力等5项。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 呂宋
nodes.summary: 呂宋是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联13种鸟类，包括Rufous coucal、Flame-breasted fruit dove、菲律賓三趾翠鳥等13种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines where it is only found in the mountains of Luzon

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines where it is only found in the mountains of Luzon

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss, poaching for the pet trade and hunting for food. This species was formerly placed in the genus Ptilinopus. It is illegal to hunt, capture or keep flame-breasted fruit-doves under Philippine Law RA 9147.{{Cite web|last=11th Congress|title=Republic Act No

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The rate of habitat loss in montane forest now much lower and has supposedly slowed down. It is threatened by habitat loss, poaching for the pet trade, nest disturbance and hunting for food

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Habitat loss is its main threat with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
